nasb.text: But the more they afflicted them, the more they multiplied and the more they spread out, so that they were in dread of the sons of Israel.

esv.text: But the more they were oppressed, the more they multiplied and the more they spread abroad. And the Egyptians were in dread of the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 但是，埃及人越苦害他們，他們就越發增多，越發繁衍。埃及人就懼怕以色列人。

ccb.text: 以色列人越受奴役，人口增长得越快，散居的范围也越广，令埃及人感到恐惧。
